basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani (BITS Pilani)
basic_details.short_information: The Birla Institute of Technology and Science Pilani Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website.Has been announced through the BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026. Candidates who have completed MSc in Chemistry or ME/MTech in relevant interdisciplinary branches with at least 60% marks are eligible to apply for these Junior Research Fellow vacancies. The application process for BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 has started and will remain open until 07 June 2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and a

qualification.education_qualification: MSc in Chemistry (with at least 60 % marks) or ME/MTech
qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow: MSc in Chemistry (with at least 60 % marks) ME/MTech in interdisciplinary branches relevant to the topic (with at least 60% marks) Lab experience in Inorganic chemistry, Synthesis and Electrochemistry is preferred.

salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow: Rs. 37,000/- per month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BITS Pilani Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
